mapper.sql: su.id id, su.USERNAME USERNAME, su.PASSWORD PASSWORD, su.NAME NAME, su.role_manage_id role_manage_id, su.create_time create_time, su.update_time update_time, su.signature signature, su.account_status account_status, su.email email, su.phone phone, su.sex sex, su.user_prefs user_prefs
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user ( USERNAME, PASSWORD, NAME, role_manage_id, create_time, update_time, signature, account_status, email, phone, sex, user_prefs ) values ( #{USERNAME}, #{PASSWORD}, #{NAME}, #{role_manage_id}, now(), now(), #{signature}, IFNULL(#{account_status},'1'), #{email}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{user_prefs} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user USERNAME = #{USERNAME}, PASSWORD = #{PASSWORD}, NAME = #{NAME}, role_manage_id = #{role_manage_id}, signature = #{signature}, account_status = #{account_status}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, sex = #{sex}, user_prefs = #{user_prefs}, update_time = now(),
WHERE id = #{id};
